findings.title: Synthetic row metadata is template-position-derived, not plan-authoritative
findings.description: All three micro-phases reuse one fixed UI_WORKFLOW_UNITS template indexed by position, so each row's title/deliverable_type/evidence_mode comes from template position rather than the plan's per-unit definitions. The single M02 row (RP03.P04.M02.S08, micro_title 'Type And Shape Definition', evidence_mode 'ui_type_shape_terminal') is therefore titled 'Secondary interaction' with deliverable_type 'ui'. validateAuditComplianceCp140Coverage only cross-checks unit IDs/order/count against the plan, and the deliverable/evidence-mode distributions are asserted against hardcoded constants, so these descriptive attributes are internally self-consistent but never compared to the plan's authoritative unit attributes. Acceptable for an explicitly synthetic, no-write reference catalog, but it means row titles/types should not be treated as the plan's real unit metadata.
findings.recommendation: Document that row titles/deliverable types are catalog-side synthetic descriptors; if the closeout plan carries authoritative per-unit titles/types, consider cross-validating them in validateAuditComplianceCp140Coverage to prevent silent drift between catalog descriptors and plan definitions.

findings.title: Hermes evidence_refs points to a cp00-140 manifest not materialized in this changeset
findings.description: createAuditComplianceCp140HermesEvidencePacket lists docs/closeout-packs/cp00-140/manifest.json in evidence_refs, and both audit.test.js and validate-rp03-audit-architecture.mjs attempt to read that path. Neither the staged diff nor the reported working-tree status includes this file; both readers fall back to closeoutPackPlan.packs (CP00-140), which is why validation passes. The packet also stamps every supplied command with status 'passed' without execution, consistent with the no-execution descriptor design. This is non-blocking but the H03 evidence reference currently resolves only via the plan fallback rather than a real artifact.
findings.recommendation: Confirm the cp00-140 closeout manifest is produced during the closeout step (or that reliance on the plan fallback is intentional), so the H03 evidence_ref resolves to an existing artifact; optionally avoid asserting an unconditional 'passed' status in the descriptor.

adjudication_notes: Raw Claude review returned PASS_WITH_FINDINGS with P0=0, P1=0, P2=0, P3=2.
P3 synthetic descriptor metadata note is documented as non-authoritative catalog wording; unit ID/order/count remain plan-authoritative through validateAuditComplianceCp140Coverage.
P3 manifest evidence-ref note is resolved by materializing docs/closeout-packs/cp00-140/manifest.json and validating it through npm run closeout-pack:validate CP00-140.
Unresolved P0/P1/P2/P3 counts are zero after adjudication.
coverage_notes: CP00-140 adds a no-write, synthetic-only UI workflow continuation catalog for the RP03 audit/compliance kernel covering 40 units (RP03.P04.M02.S08 through RP03.P04.M04.S17). The new module exposes only pure functions returning Object.freeze'd descriptors; it performs no filesystem, network, DOM, browser, screenshot, or interaction operations and writes no product/audit/permission/tenant/Hermes/Claude state. freezeNoWriteResult enforces the attestation by setting every no-write/no-render flag false after the spread, so result flags cannot be overridden upward. Coverage is correct and unique (40 units, first RP03.P04.M02.S08, last RP03.P04.M04.S17), the deliverable/evidence-mode distributions sum to 40, and the contract (bumped v0.6->v0.7), catalog, tests, and validation script agree on production_ready_flag, H03/C03 binding, CP00-139 inheritance, and the CP00-141 / RP03.P04.M04.S18 handoff. Hidden-field policy and no-write attestations are declarative field-name lists and boolean falses; no secret values, raw document/email text, unauthorized object names, cross-tenant counts, or Claude/Hermes internals are exposed. implements_ldip and splits_hrx_product remain false. No P0/P1 issues found; two non-blocking P3 notes only.
Coverage validation returned covered_unit_count=40, first=RP03.P04.M02.S08, last=RP03.P04.M04.S17.
Catalog readiness rows=40; deliverable counts sum to 40; evidence modes bind UI type terminal, primary workflow, and secondary workflow opening references.
H03 packet H03.CP00-140.audit_compliance_ui_workflow_continuation and C03 packet C03.CP00-140.audit_compliance_ui_workflow_continuation remain read-only reference evidence gates.
Closeout handoff points to undefined / RP03.P04.M04.S18.
